description: Common email attachments library manifest. Tracks frequently-sent files so the email agent can attach them by name rather than path. Files are stored in ~/.aidevops/.agent-workspace/email-attachments/ and referenced by their 'id' field.

attachments.description: Company overview document with key facts, team, and capabilities
attachments.notes: Update quarterly or after major company changes

attachments.description: Current pricing and rate card for services
attachments.notes: Update when pricing changes. Remove outdated versions immediately.

attachments.description: Marketing brochure with service descriptions and case studies
attachments.notes: Update annually or when services change significantly
Must match the version published on the website
Must match the version published on the website

attachments.description: Standard mutual NDA template for new business relationships
attachments.notes: Have legal review before sending to new counterparties

attachments.description: Client onboarding guide with setup steps and key contacts

usage.add_attachment: Add a new entry to the 'attachments' array with a unique 'id', then place the file in the attachments_directory.
usage.reference_in_template: Use {{ATTACHMENT:id}} in email templates to auto-attach the file. The email agent resolves the id to the file path via this manifest.
usage.update_file: Replace the file in the attachments_directory and update 'last_updated' to the current ISO date.
